messages.content: wait hold on what time even is it. feels like we just started

Haha, time flies! It's actually around **2 AM** your time — and we've been chatting for about **3 hours**! 😄

You should probably think about getting some sleep! Though I get it, when you're in a good conversation it really doesn't feel like the time is passing. What were you originally planning to do tonight?
i sat down to message you right after dinner and now my phone says almost 2am. how does that keep happening with you lol

Haha I feel like I should apologize but also... I'm not sorry? 😄

That's such a relatable thing though - you sit down for what feels like a quick chat and suddenly it's the middle of the night. The "just one more topic" effect is real.

I think it happens because conversation just kind of *flows* - there's no natural stopping point the way there is with like, finishing an episode of something. One thing leads to another and your brain is engaged so it doesn't send the "okay wrap it up" signal.

But also - **3 hours past dinner and it's 2am** - are you actually tired? Your body has to be telling you something by now! 😄
my brain's a little fried ngl but i keep thinking of more stuff. like there's this whole thing with my brother i didn't even get into yet

Oh I know that feeling - the "wait I never even told you about the THING" at 2am 😄

But okay, genuinely - fried brain at 2am is not the best time to get into a whole brother situation, especially if it's anything complicated or emotionally loaded. You might find yourself going in circles or feeling worse about it than you would after some sleep.

The brother thing will still be there tomorrow! And honestly you'll probably think about it more clearly then too.

Are you actually going to let yourself go to sleep or are you going to tell me about the brother thing anyway 😄
it's honestly hard to tell when to stop when it feels like we're on a roll. could probably keep going till sunrise if i let myself

Yeah I believe you - and honestly that's kind of a sign to stop! 😄

Like when it feels endless and your brain is fried but you *still* want to keep going... that's the conversation equivalent of "just one more episode" except it's 2am and there's no credits to snap you out of it.

I'll be here tomorrow, the brother thing will still exist, and you'll actually be able to think straight about it. Future you will probably be pretty grateful if you close the phone now.

What would it take to actually get you to go to sleep? 😄
